title: Duties of assistant secretary
doc_html:
§2050.26.  Duties of assistant secretary

The assistant secretaries may not delegate the duties assigned to them by this Subtitle which require the exercise of deliberative discretion.

Acts 1995, No. 947, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1996.
